title: Grilled Tofu Skewers with Savory Glaze
description: A keto-friendly Filipino-inspired dish featuring marinated tofu skewers grilled to perfection and served with a savory glaze.
instructions: 1. Cut the tofu into 1-inch (2.5 cm) cubes and place them in a shallow dish.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together the savory sauce, coconut oil, garlic, salt, and pepper. Pour the marinade over the tofu and toss to coat.
3. Thread the marinated tofu cubes onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
4. Brush the olive oil onto the tofu skewers and season with salt and pepper.
5. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat. Grill the tofu skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until they are golden brown and crispy.
6. While the tofu is grilling, prepare the savory glaze by whisking together the savory sauce and coconut oil in a small bowl.
7. Brush the savory glaze onto the tofu skewers during the last minute of grilling.
8. Serve the grilled tofu skewers hot, garnished with chopped cilantro and additional savory sauce if desired.
9. Optional: Serve with a side of steamed vegetables or a salad for a complete meal.
